---
name: New App Proposal
about: Propose a new app pattern for Contextium
title: '[App] '
labels: new-app
---

## App Name

What should this app be called?

## What It Does

Describe the app's purpose in 1-2 sentences.

## Pattern

Which automation pattern does it follow?
- [ ] Timer + Email (scheduled delivery)
- [ ] Data Sync (ingest external data)
- [ ] System/Event (respond to events)
- [ ] Reference (manual protocol)
- [ ] Utility (shared helper)
- [ ] Briefing (aggregate + deliver)

## Integrations Needed

Which integrations does this app require?

## Protocol

How does it work? (Steps, triggers, outputs)

## Would You Build It?

- [ ] Yes, I'll submit a PR
- [ ] No, I'm requesting someone else build it
